## Fractal

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(spatialdataR)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

```{r load-data}
url <- sprintf(
    "https://zenodo.org/records/10519143/files/%s.zip?download=1",
    fnm <- "20200812-CardiomyocyteDifferentiation14-Cycle1.zarr")

# retrieve
zip <- tempfile(fileext=".zip")
download.file(url, zip, quiet=TRUE)

# decompress
unzip(zip, exdir=dirname(zip))
zs <- file.path(dirname(zip), fnm)
cat(basename(zs))
```

```{r read-data}
iz <- file.path(zs, "B/03/0")
lz <- file.path(iz, "labels/nuclei")

(i <- addCT(readImage(iz), "foo"))
(l <- addCT(readLabel(lz), "foo"))

sd <- SpatialData(
    images=list(image=i),
    labels=list(cells=l))

id <- unique(SparseArray::nzvals(data(label(sd))))
se <- SingleCellExperiment(colData=DataFrame(id))
(sd <- setTable(sd, "cells", se))
```

### analysis

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=9}
pal <- sample(colors(), ncol(table(sd)), replace=TRUE)
a <- plotSpatialData() + 
    plotImage(sd) 
b <- plotSpatialData() + 
    plotLabel(sd, c="id", pal=pal, a=2/3) + 
    theme(legend.position="none")
c <- plotSpatialData() + 
    plotImage(sd) +
    plotLabel(sd, c="id", pal=pal, a=2/3) +
    theme(legend.position="none")
wrap_plots(a, b, c, ncol=1)
```

### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
